title: The order/placement of ARGs in Containerfile should not discard '--build-arg' values
body:
I'm using buildah with a containerfile containing ARGs.

The order of the ARGs seems to be important for buildah, esp. when resolving values that are provided by `--build-arg`.

Containerfile:
```
ARG VERSION=""
from fedora:${VERSION}
ARG a=aa
ARG b=bb
run echo $a
run echo $b
```

run with
```
buildah bud -f Containerfile --build-arg a=xx --build-arg VERSION=latest -t test .
```

Output:
```
STEP 1/5: FROM fedora:latest
STEP 2/5: ARG a=aa
STEP 3/5: ARG b=bb
STEP 4/5: run echo $a
xx
STEP 5/5: run echo $b
bb
COMMIT test
```

This is expected.  
Now, change the order of the ARGs:

```
ARG VERSION=""
ARG a=aa
from fedora:${VERSION}
ARG b=bb
run echo $a
run echo $b
```

Build:
```
buildah bud -f Containerfile --build-arg a=xx --build-arg VERSION=latest -t test .
```

Output:
```
STEP 1/4: FROM fedora:latest
STEP 2/4: ARG b=bb
STEP 3/4: run echo $a

STEP 4/4: run echo $b
bb
COMMIT test
```

The bug is, that the value of `a` is missing now.
Is it really intended to have such a preference on the appearance/position in the containerfile?

comments.body:
```
buildah --version
buildah version 1.39.3 (image-spec 1.1.0, runtime-spec 1.2.0)
```

I would really like to understand, why in the case of the variable 'VERSION' the '--build-arg' is taken into account properly?

ARGs declared/defined before the first FROM instruction are only defined for use in FROM instructions.  An ARG defined after the first FROM instruction is defined until the next FROM instruction, if there is one (or, if it's a multi-stage build, once https://github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/304 gets merged, in stages that are based on the stage where the ARG was defined, ).

In your second example, the arg "a" was not declared as valid for the stage, so like an unset variable, it evaluated to an empty value when the "RUN echo" instruction was executed.

Thanks a lot for the info.
Seems i never really understood this part of the docs:
https://docs.docker.com/reference/dockerfile/#understand-how-arg-and-from-interact

Your doc is better :-)
